[Mon 2026-04-20 21:01 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: # Article Writing Task: CTDL: Tree & Graph

## Context
You are the article-writing agent for MAIY Tech Hub. Your job is to write a complete MDX article and save it to the correct location, then register it in the publishing queue.

## Tomorrow's Date & Time
- Date: **2026-04-21** (Tuesday)
- Scheduled slot: **evening** (19:00 ICT = UTC+7)

## Topic
**CTDL: Tree & Graph** — Vietnamese blog covering Cấu trúc dữ liệu & Giải thuật focusing on Trees and Graphs.

## Your Tasks

### 1. Write the MDX Article
Write a complete, high-quality MDX article about Tree & Graph data structures in Vietnamese. The article must:

- **Title**: Compelling Vietnamese title (e.g., "Cây & Đồ Thị: Nền Tảng Của Mọi Thuật Toán Phức Tạp")
- **Content**: 500-800 words of substantive content
- **Language**: Vietnamese with Vietnamese punctuation ("" và '')
- **Code examples**: MUST include at least 2 code examples in C++ or Java implementing tree/graph algorithms (e.g., BFS, DFS, Binary Tree traversal, or Graph representation)
- **Category**: `ctdl`
- **Tags**: `algorithm`, `ctdl`, `tree`, `graph`, `tutorial` (pick 3-5)
- **Excerpt**: 1-2 sentences describing the article
- **Reading time**: 6-8 minutes
- **Slug**: Generate a URL-friendly slug (e.g., `cay-va-do-thi-co-ban`)

### 2. Save the MDX File
Save the article to:
```
/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub/content/articles/ctdl/[slug].mdx
```

The MDX file must use this exact frontmatter format:

```mdx
---
title: "Your Title Here"
date: "2026-04-21"
excerpt: "Your 1-2 sentence excerpt"
category: "ctdl"
tags: ["algorithm", "ctdl", "tree", "graph", "tutorial"]
readingTime: "7 phút"
---
```

Then the article body content.

### 3. Register in Publishing Queue
Make an HTTP POST to:
```
http://localhost:3000/api/cron/publish
```

With JSON body:
```json
{
  "slot": "evening",
  "scheduledDate": "2026-04-21",
  "title": "Your Article Title"
}
```

Use curl from the shell. The API should be running on localhost:3000.

### 4. Report Back
After completing, write a summary to:
```
/root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/master-orchestrator/memory/cron-evening-2026-04-20.md
```

Include: article title, slug, path saved, API response, and any issues encountered.

## Quality Standards
- Real, educational content — not filler or generic text
- Code examples must be correct and compilable
- Vietnamese language throughout body content
- Proper Vietnamese punctuation
- Professional technical writing tone
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

content.text:
// Content queue for auto-publishing
// Phase 1: Queue data structure + helpers
// Phase 2: AI writer integration
// Phase 3: Image auto-assignment

export interface QueuedArticle {
  slug: string
  title: string
  slot: 'noon' | 'evening'
  scheduledDate: string // ISO date YYYY-MM-DD
  status: 'draft' | 'queued' | 'published'
  source: 'ai' | 'human'
  category: string
  tags: string[]
  heroImage?: string
  author: string
  readingTime: number
  excerpt: string
}

export interface PublishSlot {
  name: 'noon' | 'evening'
  label: string
  cronUTC: string
  cronVN: string
  topic: 'hot-tech' | 'academic'
}

export const PUBLISH_SLOTS: PublishSlot[] = [
  {
    name: 'noon',
    label: 'Trưa 12:00',
    cronUTC: '0 5 * * *',      // 05:00 UTC = 12:00 UTC+7
    cronVN: '12:00 (ICT)',
    topic: 'hot-tech',
  },
  {
    name: 'evening',
    label: 'Tối 19:00',
    cronUTC: '0 12 * * *',     // 12:00 UTC = 19:00 UTC+7
    cronVN: '19:00 (ICT)',
    topic: 'academic',
  },
]

// Pre-seeded articles for immediate publishing
// In production: this comes from database
export const ARTICLE_QUEUE: QueuedArticle[] = [
  // Noon slots — Hot tech, short
  {
    slug: 'ai-agent-2026-noi-bat-hon-bao-gio',
    title: 'AI Agent 2026 – Trợ Lý AI Bước Qua Kỷ Nguyên Hành Động',
    slot: 'noon',
    scheduledDate: '2026-04-20',
    status: 'queued',
    source: 'ai',
    category: 'ai',
    tags: ['ai', 'llm', 'ai-agent', 'automation', 'research'],
    heroImage: '/images/posts/ai-ml.jpg',
    author: 'MAIY Bot',
    readingTime: 5,
    excerpt: 'Năm 2026 đánh dấu bước ngoặt lớn khi AI không còn dừng lại ở việc trả lời câu hỏi mà chuyển sang hành động thực sự.',
  },
  {
    slug: 'ai-code-review-github-copilot',
    title: 'AI Code Review: GitHub Copilot Thay Thế Developer?',
    slot: 'noon',
    scheduledDate: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
    status: 'queued',
    source: 'ai',
    category: 'ai',
    tags: ['ai', 'github-copilot', 'code-review', 'productivity'],
    heroImage: '/images/posts/ai-code.jpg',
    author: 'MAIY Bot',
    readingTime: 4,
    excerpt: 'GitHub Copilot không chỉ gợi ý code — nó đang dần thay thế nhiều công việc của developer. Thực hư ra sao?',
  },
  {
    slug: 'mang-va-thuat-toan-sap-xep',
    title: 'Mảng & Thuật Toán Sắp Xếp: Từ O(n²) đến O(n log n) 🔍⚡',

export function getNextArticleForSlot(slot: 'noon' | 'evening'): QueuedArticle | null {
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  return ARTICLE_QUEUE.find(
    (a) => a.slot === slot && (a.status === 'queued' || a.status === 'draft') && a.scheduledDate >= today
  ) || null
}

export function markAsPublished(slug: string): void {
  const article = ARTICLE_QUEUE.find((a) => a.slug === slug)
  if (article) article.status = 'published'
}
